mapper.insert: insert into orders (order_no, user_id, status, product_amount, shipping_fee, discount_amount, payable_amount, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, pay_expire_time, close_deadline_time, create_time, update_time) values (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{productAmount}, #{shippingFee}, #{discountAmount}, #{payableAmount}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, #{payExpireTime}, #{closeDeadlineTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into order_items(order_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, product_price, quantity, subtotal, create_time) VALUES
( #{item.orderId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.productImage}, #{item.productPrice}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.subtotal}, now() )
mapper.select: select id as orderId, order_no as orderNo, status, product_amount as productAmount, shipping_fee as shippingFee, discount_amount as discountAmount, payable_amount as payableAmount, receiver_name as receiverName, receiver_phone as receiverPhone, receiver_address as receiverAddress, pay_expire_time as payExpireTime, close_deadline_time as closeDeadlineTime, create_time as createTime from orders where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc

select id as orderId, order_no as orderNo, status, product_amount as productAmount, shipping_fee as shippingFee, discount_amount as discountAmount, payable_amount as payableAmount, receiver_name as receiverName, receiver_phone as receiverPhone, receiver_address as receiverAddress, pay_expire_time as payExpireTime, close_deadline_time as closeDeadlineTime, create_time as createTime from orders where id = #{orderId} and user_id = #{userId}

select id, product_id as productId, product_name as productName, product_image as productImage, product_price as productPrice, quantity, subtotal from order_items where order_id = #{orderId} order by id asc
mapper.update: update orders set status = 'CANCELED', cancel_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{orderId} and user_id = #{userId} and status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT'
update orders set status='PAID', pay_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{orderId} and user_id = #{userId} and status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT' and pay_expire_time >= now()
